name: Orange Knots
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water. Add the next seven ingredients and 3 cups of flour; beat until smooth.
2. Gradually add remaining flour to form a soft dough.
3. Turn dough onto a floured surface; knead until smooth (about 6-8 minutes).
4. Place dough in a greased bowl, turning once. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled (about 2 hours).
5. Punch down the dough. Roll into a 16x10-inch rectangle about 1/2-inch thick.
6. Cut into 10x3/4-inch strips. Roll lightly and tie into knots.
7. Place on greased baking sheets; tuck ends under.
8. Cover and let rise until doubled (about 30 minutes).
9. Bake at 400°F for 10-12 minutes until golden brown. Cool on wire racks.
10. Combine icing ingredients and drizzle over rolls.
